title: Manor's Bounty
body:
Description

_**🫐Description🫐**_

![Manor's Bounty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef1dcf03de88a96f14f27600f82a74d132bf6334.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/cYpFeI_jUFk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Manor's Bounty is an agricultural-themed mod that adds food, leisure, travel, decoration, construction, and more.

It allows players to collect their favorite foods and decorate their homes in their preferred style, reflecting a charming exotic flair.

The mod enhances enjoyment in food, clothing, housing, and transportation, while offering rich, engaging content that sparks creativity and endless possibilities. Its inclusive design welcomes players from different countries and regions, offering both native and exotic decorations and foods.

The mod features a variety of kitchen utensils and transforms the basic GUI interaction into an immersive personal kitchen experience. Full of fun and challenges, it tests whether you are a qualified chef! You can assemble the unique blocks in unexpected ways—who knows what surprises await?

Let's see who becomes the most creative design director!

**Note:** This mod requires **GeckoLib** and **JEI** as dependencies.

**Languages:English/简体中文/日本語**

**🍋‍🟩Mod Loaders🍋‍🟩**

It's a **Forge** mod./**Forge** 向けのMODです。

**Minimum dependency versions/前提MODの最低バージョン要件:**

**Forge:** 47.4+ **GeckoLib:** 4.7.4+ **JEI:** 15.20.0.112+

**Official version: starting from 0.3.0**

**正式版：0.3.0 から**

![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e687eb8e04df6fde4a0151df5ad9e0c1bb62785c_0.webp)
